parameters.query: SELECT c.payload, c.extracted_at FROM (SELECT 1 AS dummy) d LEFT JOIN gda_mega_cache c ON c.id = 1 AND c.extracted_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '60 minutes' LIMIT 1

SELECT json_build_object('funnel', (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(f ORDER BY f.ord), '[]'::json) FROM (SELECT stage, COUNT(*) as count, COALESCE(SUM(estimated_value),0) as value, CASE stage WHEN 'Identified' THEN 0 WHEN 'Investigating' THEN 1 WHEN 'Pursuing' THEN 2 WHEN 'Proposal' THEN 3 WHEN 'Submitted' THEN 4 WHEN 'Won' THEN 5 WHEN 'Lost' THEN 6 WHEN 'No-Go' THEN 7 ELSE 8 END as ord FROM gda_opportunity_tracker WHERE stage IS NOT NULL GROUP BY stage) f), 'risks', (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(r), '[]'::json) FROM (SELECT title, severity, category, status FROM gda_risk_register ORDER BY CASE severity WHEN 'CRITICAL' THEN 0 WHEN 'HIGH' THEN 1 WHEN 'MEDIUM' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END LIMIT 10) r), 'stats', (SELECT row_to_json(s) FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) as total_opps, COUNT(CASE WHEN gda_label='PURSUE' THEN 1 END) as pursue, COUNT(CASE WHEN gda_label='EVALUATE' THEN 1 END) as evaluate, COUNT(CASE WHEN stage='Won' THEN 1 END) as won, COALESCE(SUM(estimated_value),0) as pipeline_value, COUNT(CASE WHEN response_deadline IS NOT NULL AND response_deadline::date BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE AND CURRENT_DATE + 14 THEN 1 END) as deadlines_14d FROM gda_opportunity_tracker WHERE stage NOT IN ('No-Bid','Cancelled','No-Go','Lost','Won')) s), 'trends', (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(t), '[]'::json) FROM (SELECT category, finding, source, agency FROM gda_intelligence_log ORDER BY timestamp DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 10) t), 'contracts', (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(c), '[]'::json) FROM (SELECT id, name, client, piid, idv, naics, contract_type as type, ceiling, funded, pop_start, pop_end, option_years, options_exercised, status, pm, cotr, employees, location, description, key_personnel, fy_revenue FROM gda_active_contracts ORDER BY ceiling DESC) c), 'sitrep_opps', (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(o), '[]'::json) FROM (SELECT opp_title, agency, stage, gda_label, estimated_value, response_deadline FROM gda_opportunity_tracker WHERE stage NOT IN ('No-Bid','Cancelled','No-Go','Lost','Won') AND gda_label IN ('PURSUE','EVALUATE') ORDER BY response_deadline ASC NULLS LAST LIMIT 15) o), 'opps', (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(p), '[]'::json) FROM (SELECT id, opp_title AS "Opportunity", agency AS "Agency", ROUND((estimated_value/1000000.0)::numeric, 2) AS "Est. value ($M)", gda_score AS "GDA score", NULL AS "PWin", response_deadline AS "Due date" FROM gda_opportunity_tracker WHERE stage NOT IN ('No-Bid','Cancelled','No-Go','Lost','Won') ORDER BY response_deadline ASC NULLS LAST LIMIT 50) p), 'briefing', (SELECT row_to_json(b) FROM (SELECT briefing AS summary, headlines, generated_at FROM gda_morning_briefings ORDER BY generated_at DESC LIMIT 1) b)) as mega
SELECT summary, headlines, generated_at FROM gda_morning_briefings ORDER BY generated_at DESC LIMIT 1
INSERT INTO gda_mega_cache (id, payload, extracted_at) VALUES (1, $payload${{ $json.payload }}$payload$, NOW()) ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET payload = EXCLUDED.payload, extracted_at = NOW()
